description_long: This object is a large, antique-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and made of dark, weathered metal, showing signs of age and use. The carriage is constructed from thick, rough wooden planks, reinforced with metal bands and featuring four solid wooden wheels for mobility. The wood is heavily textured, with visible grain and a worn, rustic appearance, while the metal components are matte and slightly corroded. The front of the cannon is open, revealing the bore, and the rear includes a knob-like cascabel for handling. This type of object would historically be found in fortifications or on old city streets as a relic or decorative piece.
description: A large, weathered metal cannon mounted on a rustic wooden carriage with four wheels, featuring a long barrel and aged textures.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon barrel and the detailed wooden carriage with visible wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical structure of the carriage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the cannon and carriage, with similar details as view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the breech end of the cannon and the back of the wooden carriage.
